response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical curiosity, and demonstrable leadership in open-source and mentoring, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI/GenAI systems, direct cloud-based RAG/vector DB implementation, or enterprise customer-facing technical leadership — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in building and open-sourcing complex systems (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong technical mentoring and workshop leadership, aligning with staff-level knowledge-sharing expectations
concerns: No explicit mention of GenAI, RAG, or vector database implementations in professional context
AI/ML experience appears incidental (e.g., 'AI-agent infrastructure' at re:cinq) without depth or scale
Lacks demonstrable experience leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders
